title: rubus bilobus
intro: Rubus bilobus, also known as the Tasmanian raspberry or twin-leaf raspberry, is a plant species in the rose family that is native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus bilobus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in capsule or tablet form to harness its medicinal properties.
